channel.title: Comments for page "Rainier Night"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Rainier Night"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is great. A tale about a lesser-known short SCP that expands on it and has a somewhat unexpected but entirely reasonable twist. +1, you hit it out of the park!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Well hey hey, Site-64 made it into a contest entry. Nice.

Overall, I like the tale. Its short, and the interaction at the end between the anomaly and the young researcher was intense for how brief it was.

+1 Stormbreath.

item.title: JAM-CON III - DARK AND STORMY
item.content:encoded:
My third and final entry for Jam-Con 2018, inspired by SCP-1646.

Thanks to Phantom, not_a_seagull and Kakroom for looking this over.

If you liked this thing and would like to read some comments about it, or check out other things I've written, head to my author page for more!
